inputs.label: Number of Fines Issued
inputs.businessContext: Total number of traffic or logistics fines issued

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of traffic or logistics fines issued
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam kesilen trafik veya lojistik ceza sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der verhängten Verkehrs- oder Logistikstrafen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'amendes de trafic ou logistiques reçues
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de multas de tráfico o logística impuestas
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد مخالفات المرور أو اللوجستيات المحررة

inputs.label: Fine Amount per Fine
inputs.businessContext: Base fine amount to be paid for each penalty

businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir ceza için ödenmesi gereken temel para cezası tutarı
businessContext_i18n.de: Grundbetrag der Geldstrafe, der pro Verstoß zu zahlen ist
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant de base de l'amende à payer pour chaque infraction
businessContext_i18n.es: Importe base de la multa a pagar por cada infracción
businessContext_i18n.ar: مبلغ الغرامة الأساسي المستحق لكل مخالفة

inputs.label: Aggravating Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier based on penalty severity (e.g., recurrence, crop damage, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier based on penalty severity (e.g., recurrence, damage height, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ceza ciddiyetine göre çarpan (örn. tekerrür, yük hasarı vb.)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator je nach Schwere des Verstoßes (z.B. Wiederholung, Ladungsschaden usw.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur selon la gravité de l'infraction (ex. récidive, dommage à la cargaison, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor según la gravedad de la infracción (p. ej., reincidencia, daños a la carga, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل حسب خطورة المخالفة (مثل التكرار، الضرر العالي، إلخ)

inputs.label: Processing Fee (Per Penalty)
inputs.businessContext: Administrative processing fee charged for each penalty

businessContext_i18n.en: Administrative processing fee charged per penalty
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her ceza için tahsil edilen idari işlem ücreti
businessContext_i18n.de: Verwaltungsgebühr, die pro Verstoß erhoben wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais administratifs perçus pour chaque amende
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa administrativa cobrada por cada multa

inputs.label: Early Payment Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage discount applied for early payment (0 if no discount)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage discount applied for early payment (0 means no discount)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken ödeme durumunda uygulanacak yüzde indirim (0 ise indirim yok)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Rabatts bei Vorauszahlung (0 = kein Rabatt)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise en cas de paiement anticipé (0 si aucune remise)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de descuento aplicable en caso de pago anticipado (0 si no hay descuento)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الخصم المئوية المطبقة عند الدفع المبكر (0 يعني لا خصم)
